title: StratiqAI Widget Manifest
description: Declarative sidecar for a dashboard widget package. Lives at packages/widget-<kind>/widget.manifest.json. Drift-check script validates this against the defineWidget() export.

kind.description: Stable camelCase identifier matching defineWidget({ kind }).

schemaVersion.description: Version string (e.g. 'v1'). Bump on breaking schema changes.

displayName.description: Human-readable label shown in the widget palette.

input.description: Subscribe-side contract: payloads the widget consumes.

schemaId.description: Canonical schema id registered in ValidatedTopicStore, e.g. 'widget:metric-v1'.

topicPattern.description: Topic pattern for inbound data, e.g. 'widgets/metric/+'.

jsonSchema.description: JSON Schema derived from the input Zod schema. Optional here if generated at build time.

topicPattern.description: Topic pattern for published data, e.g. 'widgets/metric/+/out'.

jsonSchema.description: JSON Schema for the output payload. Optional here if generated at build time.

output.description: Publish-side contract, or null if the widget is subscribe-only.

icon.description: Emoji or icon key for the Add Widget palette.

entityDefinition.description: Structured EntityDefinition registered in the ontology graph. Appears on the Ontology Explorer page. When omitted, auto-derived from prompt.aiOutputSchema if prompt is present.

description.description: Optional description of what this entity represents.

jsonSchema.description: JSON Schema describing the structured output shape.

prompt.description: AI prompt template configuration. When present, a kind-level Prompt entity is created and linked to the entityDefinition's JsonSchema.

defaultPrompt.description: Default prompt template text with optional {{variable}} placeholders.

systemInstruction.description: System instruction prepended to the prompt.
